Interested individuals can access the release and additional slides on Crescent Energy Company's website: www.crescentenergyco.com. The conference call is set for 10 a.m. CT (11 a.m. ET) on Tuesday.

news.headline: Avery Dennison boosts RFID use in grocery retail sector in Mentor, Ohio.
news.summary: Avery Dennison is making strides in the grocery retail sector by increasing the use of RFID technology. The company's initiative aims to enhance efficiency and accuracy in inventory management. The expansion of RFID adoption in this industry is crucial, with reports showing a significant increase in productivity and cost savings of up to 20% for businesses that implement this technology. This step is anticipated to have a positive impact on the overall profitability of grocery retailers.

news.headline: Pagaya Tech (NASDAQ: PGY) to reveal Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 12. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on Nov 12. Visit investor.pagaya.com for details.
news.summary: Pagaya Technologies, listed on the NASDAQ as PGY, is set to unveil its Q3 2024 financial results on November 12, 2024. The company will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET / 3:30 p.m. IST on the same day to discuss the earnings. To participate in the live webcast presentation, interested individuals can register through Pagaya’s Investor Relations website at investor.pagaya.com. A replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the IR website post-event. Pagaya Technologies is a prominent player in the financial technology industry.

news.headline: FS Bancorp, Inc. reported Q3 net income of $10.3 million ($1.29 per diluted share), a increase from last year.
news.summary: In Mountlake Terrace, Washington, on October 22, 2024, FS Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSBW), the parent company of 1st Security Bank of Washington, announced a third-quarter net income of $10.3 million, translating to $1.29 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the same period last year when the net income was $9.0 million, or $1.13 per diluted share. For the nine months ending on September 30, 2024, the net income stood at $27.6 million, equivalent to $3.45 per diluted share, showing growth from the previous year’s figure of $26.3 million, or $3.33 per diluted share, for the same period in 2023.

news.headline: Treace Medical Concepts to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 5, 2024. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: In Ponte Vedra, Florida, on October 22, 2024, Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (NasdaqGS: TMCI), a medical technology company known for its Lapiplasty® and Adductoplasty® Procedures for bunions and midfoot deformities, will report its financial performance for Q3 of 2024 after markets close on November 5, 2024. A conference call led by company management to review the results will commence at 4:30 pm ET.

news.headline: Sotera Health (Nasdaq: SHC) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 5, 2024, with a conference call at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Cleveland on October 22, 2024, Sotera Health Company (Nasdaq: SHC) revealed intentions to disclose its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, prior to the market opening on Tuesday, November 5, 2024. The conference call, scheduled for 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time post-release, will feature management discussing the company’s operational achievements and financial figures. Sotera Health Company is a prominent worldwide provider of essential sterilization services, comprehensive lab testing, and advisory solutions for the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Amalgamated Financial Corp. declares dividend of $0.12 per share on Nov 21, 2024, for stockholders of record on Nov 5, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Amalgamated Financial Corp. disclosed a regular dividend of $0.12 per share for common stockholders. The dividend is set to be paid on November 21, 2024, to shareholders on record as of November 5, 2024. The Board of Directors retains the discretion over both the amount and schedule of upcoming dividend distributions. Amalgamated Financial Corp. trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AMAL.

news.headline: US commerce dept. imposes duties on imports of disposable aluminum containers from China on Oct. 22, 2024. #Tariffs #Trade #Aluminum
news.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce stated that imports of disposable aluminum containers, pans, trays, and lids from China are being unfairly subsidized by the government there, as per their preliminary assessment on Oct. 22, 2024. The investigation revealed that these imports have been benefiting from these subsidies. This decision could impact the market significantly as it addresses the preliminary findings of unfair trade practices.

news.headline: New: Coherent launches adaptable 2D cutter head for lasers with max power of 12 kW.
GCC announces third quarter 2024 results; leading supplier of cement and concrete in US and Mexico.
news.summary: In Chihuahua, Mexico, on October 22, 2024, GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: GCC*), a prominent cement and concrete supplier in the US and Mexico, reported its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Truist declares $0.52 quarterly dividend per common share, payable on Dec. 2, 2024, to shareholders of record on Nov. 8, 2024.
news.summary: Truist Financial Corporation, based in Charlotte, North Carolina, announced on October 22, 2024, that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per common share. Shareholders of record as of November 8, 2024, will receive the dividend on December 2, 2024. Truist Financial Corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol TFC.

news.headline: Collective Mining finds high-grade discovery at Apollo, drilling 57.65m @ 8.18 g/t AuEq incl. 18.85m @ 20.21 g/t AuEq.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Collective Mining Ltd. revealed the exciting identification of a fresh high-grade gold zone at the Apollo system within its Guayabales Project in Caldas, Colombia. This news comes as the company's stock, listed as CNL on the NYSE and TSX, continues to attract investor interest. The discovery marks a significant milestone for the company’s exploration efforts, boosting confidence in the potential of the Guayabales Project. This promising find underscores Collective Mining Ltd.'s commitment to unlocking further value for its shareholders and stakeholders in the mining industry.

news.headline: Weatherford reported Q3 revenue of $1.4B, with a net income of $157M (28% YoY increase). Board approved quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share. Company achieved adjusted EBITDA of $355M, a 16% YoY increase with a 25.2% margin. Deployed MPD systems in the Middle East and enhanced operational efficiency with several agreements. Shareholder returns for the quarter totaled $68M.
news.summary: Weatherford International plc reported its third-quarter results for 2024. Revenues were $1,409 million, up 7% compared to the previous year, with operating income of $243 million (an 11% increase). Net income saw a significant rise to $157 million, up by 28%, with a net income margin of 11.1%. Adjusted EBITDA also increased by 16% to $355 million. Cash provided by operating activities was $262 million, up by $112 million sequentially. The company received credit rating upgrades from both S&P Global Ratings and Fitch. Shareholder returns for the quarter were $68 million, including dividends of $18 million and share repurchases of $50 million. The company announced a cash dividend of $0.25 per share payable on December 5, 2024. Weatherford also highlighted various operational and technology achievements, including the deployment of MPD systems and receiving awards for contracts. Hosted the 20th annual FWRD conference focused on digitalization and efficiency. The company reaffirmed its focus on acquisition integrations, technology, and financial performance despite market challenges. Revenue by geography showed varied performances with a 1% decrease in international revenue sequentially but a 9% increase year-over-year. North America revenue increased by 6% sequentially. The segmented financials for Drilling and Evaluation, Well Construction and Completions, and Production and Intervention were also provided indicating revenue and adjusted EBITDA performances. Weatherford also mentioned forward-looking statements with caution on potential risks and uncertainties affecting future results. The company's financial statements for the period ended September 30, 2024, were disclosed, showcasing the revenue breakdown and operating income across the segments.

news.headline: FS Bancorp, Inc. reported Q3 net income of $10.3M or $1.29 per diluted share. Forty-seventh cash dividend of $0.27/share approved. Total deposits increased $44.5M to $2.43B in Q3 2024. Loan receivables stand at $2.46B. Book value per share increased to $37.45. Total assets increased to $2.97B in Q3 2024. Commercial and Consumer Banking segment net income was $9.3M, Home Lending segment net income was $1.0M. Regulatory capital ratios were reported at 14.2% for total risk-based capital and 11.2% for Tier 1 leverage capital.
news.summary: FS Bancorp, Inc. reported a net income of $10.3 million for the third quarter of 2024, compared to $9.0 million from the previous year. For the nine months ended September 30, 2024, net income was $27.6 million. Total deposits increased by $44.5 million to $2.43 billion, with noninterest-bearing checking increasing by $34.4 million. Loans receivable were unchanged at $2.46 billion. Consumer loans decreased by $9.3 million to $632.4 million and the company repurchased 97,000 shares of common stock in the third quarter. Book value per share increased to $37.45. The bank's regulatory capital ratios were at 14.2% for total risk-based capital and 11.2% for Tier 1 leverage capital at September 30, 2024. The company reported segments: Commercial and Consumer Banking and Home Lending, with net income of $9.3 million and $1.0 million for the third quarter of 2024, respectively. The Company also provided details on its loan portfolios and assets.

news.headline: Peapack-Gladstone Financial Corp's Q3 2024 results show deposits grew $279 million, to $5.9 billion, with net income of $7.6 million and EPS of $0.43. Net interest income rose to $37.7 million, with a net interest margin of 2.34%. AUM/AUA in their Wealth Management Division hit a record $12.1 billion, while total deposits increased by $661 million. Total loans declined $116 million to $5.3 billion. The Company repurchased $2.6 million in common stock. Tangible book value per share increased 6% to $32.00. Net income for the nine months ended Sept 30, 2024, was $23.75 million, with diluted EPS at $1.34. Return on average assets was 0.49%, and return on average equity was 5.12%. Peapack-Gladstone is confident in managing challenges in the current interest rate environment.
news.summary: Peapack-Gladstone Financial Corporation reported its third quarter 2024 financial results, showing significant growth in deposits which reached $5.9 billion, with an annualized growth rate of 20%. Noninterest-bearing demand deposits increased by $130 million to $1.1 billion. Outstanding loan balances also increased by $51 million to $5.3 billion. The Company recorded a net income of $7.6 million and diluted earnings per share of $0.43 for the quarter. Net interest income increased by $2.6 million to $37.7 million, with the net interest margin increasing to 2.34%. The Wealth Management Division's AUM/AUA peaked at $12.1 billion, with wealth management fee income totaling $15.2 million in Q3 2024. The company's capital position improved with tangible book value per share increasing to $32.00. Tier 1 Leverage Ratio stood at 10.99% for the Bank and 9.33% for the Company at September 30, 2024. The Company saw an increase of $661 million in total deposits year-to-date and repaid $404 million in short-term borrowings. Despite challenges from interest rate environment, the Company is optimistic about managing through issues and delivering shareholder value.

news.headline: ASUR reports 18% increase in revenue, 12% in EBITDA despite 2% drop in passenger traffic; Ps.7,483.3M revenue in 3Q24.
news.summary: Grupo Aeroportuario del Sureste (ASUR) reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2024, revealing a 2.1% decrease in total passenger traffic, with notable variations across its operations. Despite this decline, the company saw a significant 18.1% increase in total revenue to Ps.7,483.3 million. Revenues per passenger also rose by 7.2% to Ps.124.9. EBITDA increased by 12%, reaching Ps.4,700.4 million. However, the adjusted EBITDA margin dropped to 68.3%. ASUR ended the quarter with a strong cash position of Ps.18,483.6 million and a Debt to LTM Adjusted EBITDA ratio of negative 0.3x. Overall, the company showcased strong financial performance despite the challenges posed by a decrease in passenger traffic.

news.headline: Franklin Financial reported Q3 2024 net income of $4.2M, an increase of 39.1% from Q2, with YTD net income at $10.6M, up 4.8%. Total assets reached $2.151B in 2024. Quarter dividends declared at $0.32 per share. ROA and NIM decreased in 2024 compared to 2023. Noninterest expenses increased, effective income tax rate at 17.3% for Q3. Post-balance-sheet sale resulted in $46.7M of low-yield investment securities and recognized a loss of $3.4M. Company considers future developments in the financial statements.
news.summary: Franklin Financial Services Corporation, the bank holding company of F&M Trust, reported its Q3 2024 and YTD 2024 results. Net income for Q3 2024 was $4.2M ($0.95 per diluted share) compared to $3M for Q2 2024 and $3.9M for Q3 2023. YTD 2024 net income was $10.6M compared to $10.1M in 2023. Total assets were $2.151B as of Sep 30, 2024, up 17.2% from Dec 31, 2023. Total net loans increased by $107.5M and total deposits increased by $185.5M. Shareholders' equity increased by $17.8M to $149.9M. ROA for YTD 2024 was 0.69% compared to 0.78% in 2023. Noninterest income was $4.9M for Q3 2024. Noninterest expense was $13.9M for Q3 2024. The effective federal income tax rate was 17.3% for Q3 2024. Franklin Financial is trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market under the symbol FRAF. More information is available on their website. Franklin Financial cautions readers about forward-looking statements and advises reviewing risk factors filed with the SEC.

news.headline: Qualcomm's CEO predicts AI smartphones for all within 5 years, reported by Bloomberg.
Nyxoah will unveil Q3 2024 financial results on November 6, 2024.
Ovative Group finds TikTok ROI 23x higher than last-click models for marketers in groundbreaking insight.
news.summary: A notable media and measurement company, Ovative Group, based in Minneapolis, revealed a significant finding on October 22, 2024. Their research indicates that TikTok provides marketers with an average return on investment (ROI) that is 23 times greater than what traditional last-click models propose. Through a comprehensive analysis conducted by Ovative Group, this insightful discovery presents a transformative opportunity for advertisers aiming to optimize their marketing strategies.

news.headline: Avangrid released Q3 2024 financial results on website, $47 billion in assets, aims to be top sustainable energy firm.
news.summary: Avangrid, Inc. (NYSE:AGR) has released its third-quarter financial results for 2024 on its website, with details available in the Investors section at www.avangrid.com. Avangrid aims to become the top sustainable energy firm in the U.S., headquartered in Orange, CT, with around $47 billion in assets and activities spanning 24 states. The company operates in two main sectors.

news.headline: AmplifyMD wins 2024 Rising Star Digital Health Hub Award for Health Equity in Los Gatos, California on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Los Gatos, California called AmplifyMD, known for their virtual care automation and care delivery platform, has recently been recognized for their innovation in the industry. The company was awarded the 2024 Digital Health Hub Rising Star Health Equity award on October 22, 2024. This prestigious award acknowledges AmplifyMD as a leader in promoting health equity through their virtual care services.

news.headline: CHOP researchers show cytokine testing informed management in 30% of pediatric cases.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on October 22, 2024, experts from Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) showcased the significance of swift assessment of cytokine levels in distinguishing between diseases that share similar symptoms. A notable outcome was observed as almost 30% of healthcare providers altered their disease management strategies as a result.

news.headline: Teck Resources Cl B stock gets RS Rating upgrade, signaling technical improvement. Will the positive trend persist?
news.summary: Teck Resources Class B shares have recently received an upgrade in their Relative Strength Rating, indicating a positive trend in their technical performance. Investors may be wondering if this positive momentum will persist.

news.headline: Ormat Technologies stock has improved RS rating due to rising price performance, earning an upgrade.
news.summary: Ormat Technologies has recently demonstrated a positive trend in its price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The company has shown promising growth potential, with its stock seeing improved relative strength in the market. This positive development signifies Ormat Technologies' increasing strength compared to other stocks. Investors may find this upgrade indicative of the company's improving performance and future projections.

news.headline: Sam Altman's startup surges 150% in a month, catalyzing interest in nuclear stocks; Microsoft initiated the trend in late September.
news.summary: In late September, Microsoft sparked a surge in nuclear stocks. Sam Altman's startup saw a remarkable 150% increase in its value this month, prompting investor Cathie Wood to take action as nuclear stocks gain momentum.

news.headline: Texas Instruments exceeded Q3 estimates but provided low guidance for the current period, leading to a stock drop.
news.summary: Texas Instruments, a leading chipmaker, exceeded expectations for the third quarter, reporting strong results with revenue reaching $4.95 billion. However, the company provided a lower guidance for the next period, causing TXN stock to decline. This news was covered in an article by Investor's Business Daily titled "Chipmaker Texas Instruments Tops Q3 Views But Guides Low."

news.headline: Rate cuts create uncertainty for real estate market, says Cohen & Steers VP. #Bloomberg
news.summary: Last year, there were approximately 1.5 million reported cases of a certain disease globally, with the majority of cases being in developing countries. The number of deaths caused by this disease reached 200,000, highlighting the urgent need for increased awareness and resources to combat its spread. The situation is particularly concerning in regions with limited access to healthcare facilities and education on prevention measures. Efforts are being made by international organizations and governments to address the issue and reduce the impact of this disease on populations worldwide.

news.headline: India removes tax on select rice exports to enhance competitiveness, aiding in economic growth. #rice #exports #India
Via Transportation drivers in San Francisco join Teamsters Local 665, bringing access to transit in underserved areas.
news.summary: A recent development in San Francisco on Oct. 22, 2024, revealed that drivers employed by Via Transportation, a contractor for the San Francisco Municipal Transit Agency (SFMTA), have completed a card-check organizing effort. This allows them to join the New Teamsters, a union. The drivers sought this union representation to have better access to public transit in underserved communities. This move is significant as it impacts both the drivers and the communities they serve.

news.headline: Orrstown Financial Services, Inc. discloses Q3 2024 earnings.
In Vero Beach, FL, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. (NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC) announced the November 2024 dividend rate per common share.
news.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. based in Vero Beach, Florida, disclosed on October 22, 2024, that it will be distributing its cash dividend for November 2024 to holders of its Common Stock. The Company trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the tickers NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC.

news.headline: Retail Opportunity Investments Corp. reported $32.1 million net income in Q3'24, $33.2 million in FFO, and updated FFO guidance for 2024 to $1.03 - $1.05 per diluted share. They had $68.8 million in dispositions in Q3’24 and 97.1% portfolio lease rate. The company also reported 450,623 square feet of leasing activity in Q3’24 and a 13.8% increase in same-space cash base rents on new leases. ROIC had 1.2 million square feet of leasing activity year-to-date, with 98.7% of total gross leasable area unencumbered. They declared a $0.15 per share cash dividend and expected GAAP net income for 2024 to be within $0.45 - $0.47 per diluted share. FFO was estimated to be within $1.03 - $1.05 per diluted share for 2024.
news.summary: Retail Opportunity Investments Corp. announced financial results for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2024. Key figures include $32.1 million net income for common stockholders ($0.25 per share), $33.2 million in Funds From Operations (FFO), and a guidance update of $1.03 - $1.05 per diluted share for FFO in 2024. The company reported $68.8 million from property dispositions, with a 97.1% portfolio lease rate. They had 450,623 sq ft leased in Q3'24 (most active quarter), a 13.8% increase in new lease rents, and a 2.1% decrease in same-center NOI in Q3‘24 compared to the previous year. ROIC's total real estate assets were around $3.5 billion, with $1.4 billion in debt. Their dividend was $0.15 per share, with an update on 2024 guidance projecting $0.45 - $0.47 GAAP net income per share and $1.03 - $1.05 FFO per share. The company sold $68.8 million in properties in the third quarter, acquiring $70.1 million throughout the year.ROIC's conference call will discuss results on October 23, 2024. At present, they own 93 shopping centers totaling approximately 10.5 million sq ft. The article provides detailed financial statements, credit ratings, and further information on the company.

news.headline: Strong demand leads to record enrollment at Stride, Inc. Revenues reach $551.1 million, with operating income of $47.3 million and adjusted EBITDA of $83.9 million. Q1 fiscal 2025 saw 222.6K enrollments, up 18.5%. Cash and cash equivalents stand at $539.4 million. Fiscal year 2025 forecast: Revenue $2.225B-$2.3B, adjusted operating income $395M-$425M. Second quarter estimates include revenue $560M-$580M, and adjusted operating income $115M-$125M. (Credits: Stride, Inc.; Globe Newswire)
news.summary: Stride, Inc. announced its first fiscal quarter results for 2025, with notable increases compared to 2024. The company reported revenue of $551.1 million (up from $480.2 million), income from operations of $47.3 million (from $3.3 million), and net income of $40.9 million (from $4.9 million). Adjusted operating income and EBITDA also showed significant increases. Enrollments rose to 222.6K, with revenue per enrollment at $2,303. Cash and cash equivalents totaled $539.4 million. The company forecasts revenue of $2.225 billion to $2.3 billion for fiscal year 2025 and adjusted operating income between $395 million to $425 million. The conference call to discuss these results is set for October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Chemung Financial Corp Q3 2024: Net income of $5.7M ($1.19/share), revenue up by 2.1% to $18.4M, deposits at $2.45B. Expanding operations with new locations. Tangible equity to assets at 7.22%. 17.9% revenue increase in wealth management. Non-interest income up 5.4%. Total assets at $2.77B. $59M loan increase.
news.summary: Chemung Financial Corporation reported a net income of $5.7 million for Q3 2024, with earnings per share of $1.19, compared to $5.0 million and $1.05 per share in Q2 2024. Net interest income was $18.4 million, up from $17.8 million in the previous quarter. Total assets were $2.774 billion, up from $2.711 billion in Dec 2023. The Corporation opened a full-service branch in Williamsville, NY, and dividends declared were $0.31 per share. Loan balances increased to $2.028 billion, and tangible equity to tangible assets ratio improved to 7.22%. Non-interest income was $5.9 million, up from $5.6 million in the previous quarter. Non-interest expense was $16.5 million. The Corporation's total equity to total assets ratio was 7.95%. The Corporation has a stock repurchase program and total assets under the Wealth Management Group were $2.316 billion.

news.headline: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust Q3 2024 net income $31.0M, $0.36/share, with net investment income $80.9M. Dividend: $0.40/share.
news.summary: WESTLAKE VILLAGE, Calif.—PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) disclosed a net income attributable to common shareholders of $31.0 million, equivalent to $0.36 per common share on a diluted basis for Q3 of 2024. The net investment income stood at $80.9 million. Additionally, PMT declared a cash dividend of $0.40 per common share for Q3 2024 on September 19, 2024, scheduled to be disbursed on October 25, 2024, to common shareholders.

news.headline: Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VEL) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024. Conference call at 2:00PM PT / 5:00PM ET.
news.summary: In Westlake Village, California, Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE:VEL), a prominent provider of commercial investor loans, is set to announce its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, after the markets close. The company's executive management will conduct a conference call and webcast to discuss the results at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The conference call will be available for live webcasting in listen-only mode.

news.headline: EU funds Cemex-Linde consortium with €157M for CO2 capture project at Rüdersdorf Cement Plant, aiming to capture 1.3M metric tons of CO2 annually.
news.summary: In Monterrey, Mexico, an alliance between Cemex and Linde has secured €157 million from the EU Innovation Fund for a groundbreaking CO2 capture initiative at Cemex’s Rüdersdorf Cement Plant in Germany. This project, considered Cemex’s most significant Carbon Capture Use and Storage (CCUS) endeavor, targets capturing 1.3 million metric tons of CO2 annually from the cement production at Rüdersdorf.

news.headline: Net Power (NYSE: NPWR) to release third quarter 2024 financial results on Nov 11, 2024; conference call on Nov 12 at 8:30 AM ET.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, NET Power Inc. (NYSE: NPWR) is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 after the market closes on Monday, November 11, 2024. A conference call discussing the results will take place on Tuesday, November 12, 2024, starting at 8:30 AM ET. For those interested, the live audio webcast of the call can be accessed on Net Power’s investor relations website at ir.netpower.com. Participants can also join by phone by dialing 877-407-8014 (domestic) or +1 201-689-8053 (international).

Blanket partners with Crane to empower property managers in innovative solutions. Dallas, Oct 22, 2024.

This partnership aims to enhance collaboration among property managers. The announcement was made in Dallas on October 22, 2024. Blanket, known for its innovative solutions, has joined forces with Crane to further empower property managers.

Furthermore, there will be a conference call and webcast on November 5, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. CT (10:00 a.m. ET) led by management to discuss the financial updates.

news.headline: Greystar's Summerwell Sunterra in Katy, Texas is now offering tours, marking its 1st build-for-rent project in the Houston area.
news.summary: Greystar, a prominent figure in real estate investment, development, and management of rental housing, logistics, and life sciences, has initiated its inaugural build-for-rent project in the Houston area in KATY, Texas. This milestone was unveiled on October 22, 2024. This announcement signifies a significant step for Greystar as they branch into this new venture, marking their strategic expansion in the market. The build-for-rent project in the Houston area is a testament to Greystar’s commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: SelectQuote (NYSE: SLQT) will release Q1 2025 earnings on Nov 4; CEO and CFO to host conference call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: SelectQuote, Inc., a prominent distributor of Medicare insurance policies and expanding Healthcare Services platform, disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2025 financial results on November 4, 2024, prior to market opening. The CEO, Tim Danker, and CFO, Ryan Clement, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 8:30 am ET to review the outcomes. The company's stock trades on NYSE under the symbol SLQT.

news.headline: Andre Schulten appointed to Eaton's Board of Directors, effective Oct 22, 2024. Schulten is the CFO of P&G.
news.summary: Eaton, a prominent intelligent power management company listed on the NYSE as ETN, has revealed the election of Andre Schulten to its Board of Directors commencing on October 22, 2024. Schulten currently holds the position of Chief Financial Officer at The Procter & Gamble Company (P&G), a renowned multinational consumer goods corporation. Before assuming his current role, Schulten acted as Senior Vice President of Baby Care, North America within the company. With a tenure at P&G that began in 1996, Schulten has held various finance and accounting positions throughout his career.

news.headline: DISCO to reveal Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6, 2024, after market close. Conference call set for 4:00 p.m. CT.
news.summary: A legal technology leader, CS Disco, Inc. ("DISCO") (NYSE: LAW), based in Austin, Texas, is set to release its financial results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2024, after the market closes on November 6, 2024. The company will hold a conference call and webcast at 4:00 p.m. Central Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day to discuss the financial results and business highlights. Access to the conference call details will be provided for interested parties.
